description_long: This jet ski features a sleek, futuristic design with a streamlined metallic body and sharp, angular contours. The main hull is predominantly dark gray with glossy, reflective surfaces and subtle red highlights along the sides and top. Twin elongated rear fins extend from the back, giving it an aggressive, aerodynamic profile. The cockpit area is compact, with a small, dark-tinted windshield and visible handlebar controls. The overall build suggests a high-performance watercraft, likely constructed from lightweight metal alloys and reinforced composites. No visible branding, model name, or registration markings are present on the exterior.
description: A sleek, metallic jet ski with sharp lines, red highlights, and elongated rear fins, featuring a compact cockpit and glossy finish.
description_view_0: Front view shows the pointed nose, wide hull, and central cockpit area with visible handlebar structure.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the elongated rear fins, aerodynamic body, and the compact cockpit profile.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the twin fins, the narrow tail section, and the back of the cockpit area.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the streamlined body, rear fins, and subtle red highlights.
attribute_handlebar_design: The handlebar is compact, dark in color, and appears integrated into the cockpit with minimal visible controls or grips.
attribute_seat_configuration: The seat is a single, streamlined position integrated into the body, with a contoured shape and dark coloration, designed for one rider.
